retrospective_note: Normalized after-the-fact on 2026-03-10 to the canonical baseline-fixture contract. Original proof payload fields were summarized into canonical fingerprints.

column_key.artifact_sha256: SHA256 checksum of the input proof artifact payload.
column_key.legacy_entry_count: Number of normalized metric entries captured in the original proof payload.
column_key.row_count: Number of normalized metric rows in the run output.
column_key.rows_hash_sha256: SHA256 hash of canonical normalized metric rows.
column_key.source_uri: Source URI used for the deterministic proof input.
column_key.zip_sha256: Compatibility slot; null when ZIP payload is not applicable.
